error.title: Error
error.doExport: [ if you want to report a problem, please include exported file ]
error.reachUs: The viewer has run into an unexpected error. Please contact us and provide the error details.
error.handlerFault: A component ({{owner}}) failed while handling '{{event}}'. Some of its features might not work.
error.handlerFaultRemoved: A component ({{owner}}) kept failing on '{{event}}' and was disconnected to keep the viewer running.
error.moduleFailed: Module {{module}} failed to load and was disabled. Features depending on it are unavailable.
error.rendererUnavailable: xOpat's renderer could not start in this browser. It needs WebGL2 with capabilities this device or browser did not provide. Try an updated or different browser, or open the viewer on a desktop.
error.pluginImportFail: Plugin {{plugin}} failed to load data. Please, let us know about this issue and provide exported file.
error.cacheImportFail: Plugin {{plugin}} failed to load cached data. Please, let us know about this issue and provide exported file.
error.nothingToRenderDetails: The active session does not specify any image or layers for opening. Is your link valid?
error.renderDesc: Your browser did not pass a rendering test: the visual output might not work as intended.
error.defaultDemoHtml:
• you have an invalid link, or
  • the session has been lost - please, report the issue.
error.invalidDataHtml:
• you have an invalid link, or
  • the data you are trying to view does not exist, or
  • you are not authorized to view the data
error.macroImage: The image {{image}} you are trying to view is a macro image. No magnification scales are available.
error.sessionExpiredReloading: Your session expired or became invalid. Reloading…
error.viewerFilesNotConfigured: Viewer does not show all files - some were not properly configured!

slide.tilesFaulty: An image failed to load its tiles. The server may be temporarily unresponsive.

bar.explainSave: Save to configured backends (falls back to file download if none)

bar.saveFailed: Save failed — every configured destination refused. Use Export to keep a local copy.
bar.saveDegradedToExport: No save destinations are configured — downloading a local file instead.
bar.staticFileExplain: This browser was opened from a shared file. Changes are not being saved.

messages.pluginsWelcome: It looks like this is your first time here

messages.valueCopied: The value was copied to your clipboard.
messages.viewerDuplicateDataSource: Two viewports ({{slots}}) display the same data source. Saving or exporting targets this data once — actions from either viewport write to the same output and may overwrite each other.
messages.scrollRequiresCtrl: Hold Ctrl (or Cmd) and scroll to zoom the viewer.

messages.warnPageReload: It seems you've made some work already. It might be wise to export your setup first. Reload now.

hint.click: Click the highlighted area to continue
hint.dblclick: Double-click the highlighted area to continue
hint.keyAny: Press the indicated key to continue
hint.interact: Interact with the highlighted area to continue

menu.title: Select a tutorial
menu.description: Learn the viewer functionality through interactive tours.

tutorials.notAvailableOnMobile: Tutorials need more screen space — please open this session on a larger viewport to take the tour.

basic.title: Basic Functionality
basic.description: Pan, zoom, navigate and tweak the active visualisation.
basic.viewer:
This is the slide viewer. Drag to pan, scroll the wheel to zoom; the arrow keys and + / - also work.
In multi-viewer sessions every panel below exists per viewer; the tour walks the focused one.
basic.navigator: Open the Navigator tab on the right edge to reveal a minimap. Click anywhere on the minimap to jump straight to that region.
basic.openLayers: Click here to open the Layers tab — that's where you tweak the active visualisation.
basic.visualizationPicker: If the session ships several visualisations, switch between them from this dropdown. The shader list below repopulates instantly.
basic.layers: Each row is one shader/overlay. Toggle visibility, drag to reorder, click the gear for per-layer blending and shader controls.
basic.cache: Snapshot your shader tweaks here. With cookies enabled, the same layer name will pick them up next time the session opens.
basic.hideUi: Hide all UI for a chrome-free view of the slide. Click again to bring everything back.
basic.viewMenu: The View menu toggles panels (navigator, layers, toolbar), the visualisation inspector and the theme.
basic.reopen: You can re-open this tutorials list any time from here.

view.title: Inspector, Edit menu & Playground
view.description: Peek under the overlay, tweak settings and experiment safely.
view.inspector: When the session enables the visualisation inspector, hovering over the slide reveals what's underneath: in reveal-outside mode the overlay fades under your cursor; reveal-inside only shows the overlay there.
view.editMenu: Toggle the inspector and swap between its modes from the Edit menu (look for Visualization inspector).
view.playground: Right-click anywhere on the slide → Viewer → Open Visualization Playground. It clones the current visualisation into a sandbox where you can change shader type, palette, breaks and params — the underlying session config stays untouched.
view.fullscreen: Combine the inspector with Hide all UI for a distraction-free comparison view.

keymap.title: Keymap
keymap.resetAllConfirm: Reset all shortcuts to their defaults?

core.viewportCopyDesc: Copies the current viewport to the clipboard, or aligns the view when a copied viewport is already on it. Transferable between viewer windows.
core.peekDesc: Hold to momentarily hide the visualization overlay in the focused viewer.
core.toggleJoystickDesc: Toggle joystick navigation mode. While on, press and hold the primary mouse button to drop an anchor, then move the mouse to pan continuously — the further from the anchor, the faster.

plugins.title: Plugins
plugins.noPluginsAvailable: It seems there are no plugins
plugins.noPluginsDetails: They might be disabled. Ask the system maintainer for more features.

toolbar.confirmHide: Hide this toolbar? You can re-enable it from the View menu.
toolbar.dock: Dock toolbar to the app bar
toolbar.embedNoRoom: Not enough room in the app bar — the toolbar will dock automatically when the window is wide enough.

virtualization.sidebysideWarning: Side-by-side split opens each region as a separate slide/viewer with its own identity — annotations and saved data are keyed per region, not by the original slide. Use the 'overlaid' mode to keep a single slide identity.

pathology.clickPointPrompt: Click a point on the slide to segment, or press Esc to cancel.
pathology.selectAnnotationPrompt: Select an annotation on the slide to measure, or press Esc to cancel.
pathology.consentDescription: A script wants to send a snapshot of the current slide to a pathology model.
pathology.consentRejected: The pathology analysis was canceled by the user.
pathology.overviewHintPrompt: This is a low-magnification overview of a whole pathology slide. Briefly describe the tissue present and note any regions that look worth examining more closely. Keep it to a few sentences and do not give a diagnosis.
pathology.reviewRegionPrompt: Describe the tissue visible in this region of the pathology slide. Keep it concise and do not give a definitive diagnosis.
pathology.overviewRegionPrompt: This is one region of a pathology slide. In 1-2 sentences describe the tissue you see and whether it looks worth examining at higher magnification. Do not give a diagnosis. Then, on a FINAL separate line, output exactly: SCORE: <number 0 to 1, how salient/abnormal this region looks> DRILL: <yes or no, whether to zoom in further>.
pathology.overviewQueryPrompt: This is one region of a pathology slide. The reviewer is looking for: {{query}}. In 1-2 sentences describe what you see and how well it matches that. Do not give a diagnosis. Then, on a FINAL separate line, output exactly: SCORE: <number 0 to 1, how strongly this region matches '{{query}}'> DRILL: <yes or no, whether to zoom in to confirm>.
pathology.overviewDigest:
Highest-interest regions from the slide overview:
{{lines}}
pathology.overviewDigestQuery:
Regions most relevant to '{{query}}' from the slide overview:
{{lines}}
pathology.overviewDigestEmpty: The overview produced no described regions.

voice.transcriptionPrompt: Histology and pathology dictation. Common terms: histology, histopathology, immunohistochemistry, hematoxylin and eosin, H&E stain, mitosis, mitotic figures, stroma, stromal, carcinoma, adenocarcinoma, squamous cell, epithelium, epithelial, dysplasia, metaplasia, necrosis, nuclei, nuclear atypia, pleomorphism, lymphocyte, lymphocytic infiltrate, fibrosis, glandular, in situ, invasive, benign, malignant, biopsy, tumor, tumor grade, Gleason score, Ki-67, cytology, immunostain, margin, lesion.

Start a new turn and ask it to summarize what it found so far without further scripting.

oidc.clientSecretWarning: OIDC context '{{contextId}}' sets a client_secret in a browser client — this is insecure (the secret ships to the browser). Use the server-side oidc-server-ts module for confidential clients.
